name: MqttGraphView
description: Volume-weighted tidy-tree topic explorer (PixiJS): node size = message rate, colour = recency, with collapse, pan/zoom, minimap and follow-hottest.

props.name: getTopicPayload
props.description: A topic's latest payload, or null. Called when the context menu opens to decide whether payload actions apply.

notes: Figma page: Topic Graph - Exploration (Direction D). Canvas renderer; story mounts the real Pixi canvas on live mock traffic. Hover inspector shows msg/s + last-message age; legend explains recency ramp and sizing. Click model: clicking a collapsed parent expands it and zooms the view to the revealed subtree (a further click then selects it); clicking an expanded parent or a leaf selects it, and clicking the selected node again deselects it. Selecting a topic from the sidebar (outside the graph) zooms the graph to that topic, expanding its ancestors as needed. Message arrivals draw a brief expanding ring pulse on the node. Minimap: clicking centres the viewport on the clicked point; holding and moving drags the viewport rectangle (continuous re-centring). Gear menu's Display section also has a 'Performance stats' toggle (statsOn, persisted per connection, default off) that renders a top-right HUD overlay (fps/cap, avg frame ms, visible/placed node counts, ingest msg/s) updated on a 1s interval; see docs/topic-graph-view-spec.md 'Performance monitoring' section.
